content: The intrinsic reward modules of curiosity-driven RL (ICM and RND) can be reframed as a self-tuning active memory management system for generalist agents, where prediction error (the core signal of ICM/RND curiosity) acts as a natural priority score for storing or pruning agent memory. This re-framing means a curious agent’s intrinsic exploration drive automatically optimizes its long-term memory footprint without needing separate hand-designed memory scheduling rules.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
